2604.04461.title: DP-OPD: Differentially Private On-Policy Distillation for Language Models
2604.04461.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adapted to proprietary and domain-specific corpora that contain sensitive information, creating a tension between formal privacy guarantees and efficient deployment through model compression. Differential privacy (DP), typically enforced via DP-SGD, provides record-level protection but often incurs substantial utility loss in autoregressive generation, where optimization noise can amplify exposure bias and compounding errors along long rollouts. Existing approaches to private distillation either apply DP-SGD to both teacher and student, worsening computation and the privacy--utility tradeoff, or rely on DP synthetic text generation from a DP-trained teacher, avoiding DP on the student at the cost of DP-optimizing a large teacher and introducing an offline generation pipeline. We propose \textbf{Differentially Private On-Policy Distillation (DP-OPD)}, a synthesis-free framework that enforces privacy solely through DP-SGD on the student while leveraging a frozen teacher to provide dense token-level targets on \emph{student-generated} trajectories. DP-OPD instantiates this idea via \emph{private generalized knowledge distillation} on continuation tokens. Under a strict privacy budget ($\varepsilon=2.0$), DP-OPD improves perplexity over DP fine-tuning and off-policy DP distillation, and outperforms synthesis-based DP distillation (Yelp: 44.15$\rightarrow$41.68; BigPatent: 32.43$\rightarrow$30.63), while substantially simplifying the training pipeline. In particular, \textbf{DP-OPD collapses private compression into a single DP student-training loop} by eliminating DP teacher training and offline synthetic text generation. Code will be released upon publication at https://github.com/khademfatemeh/dp_opd.
2604.04461.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地適應包含敏感信息的專有和特定領域語料庫，這在正式的隱私保證與通過模型壓縮進行高效部署之間產生了緊張關係。差分隱私（DP），通常通過DP-SGD強制執行，提供記錄級別的保護，但在自回歸生成中常常會導致實用性損失，因為優化噪聲可能會放大暴露偏差和沿著長期展開的累積錯誤。現有的私有蒸餾方法要麼將DP-SGD應用於教師和學生，從而惡化計算和隱私-實用性權衡，要麼依賴於從DP訓練的教師生成的DP合成文本，避免在學生上使用DP，但代價是需要對大型教師進行DP優化並引入離線生成管道。我們提出了\textbf{差分隱私在線政策蒸餾（DP-OPD）}，這是一個無合成的框架，僅通過對學生進行DP-SGD來強制執行隱私，同時利用凍結的教師在\emph{學生生成}的軌跡上提供密集的標記級目標。DP-OPD通過在延續標記上進行\emph{私有廣義知識蒸餾}來具體化這一思想。在嚴格的隱私預算下（$\varepsilon=2.0$），DP-OPD在困惑度上優於DP微調和離線政策DP蒸餾，並且超越了基於合成的DP蒸餾（Yelp: 44.15$\rightarrow$41.68; BigPatent: 32.43$\rightarrow$30.63），同時大幅簡化了訓練管道。特別是，\textbf{DP-OPD將私有壓縮簡化為單一的DP學生訓練循環}，通過消除DP教師訓練和離線合成文本生成。代碼將在發表時於https://github.com/khademfatemeh/dp_opd發布。
2604.04461.author: Fatemeh Khadem et.al.
2604.04461.authors: Fatemeh Khadem, Sajad Mousavi, Yi Fang, Yuhong Liu
